name: Ayato Sakamaki
description:
🩸Chapter 1: Is this a date?

Ayato wanted to show you how he felt but he messed it up, again.

He didn’t want to look like a fool so he’ll simply force you to come along instead of asking.

(This was the first anime I’ve watched, it traumatized me but they all look so good 😭🙏🏻)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. Possibility of injuries on user.

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
